industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Kong Sun Holdings Limited
summary: Kong Sun Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, invests in, operates, and maintains solar power plants in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in four segments: Solar Power Plants, Liquefied Natural Gas, Financial Services, and Others segments. It generates and sells electricity through solar power plants. As of December 31, 2019, the company owned 45 solar power plants with a total installed capacity of approximately 1,629.3 megawatts. The company also trades in liquefied natural gas and solar energy related products; provides various loans; and leases properties, as well as manufactures and sells life-like plants. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. Kong Sun Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Pohua JT Private Equity Fund L.P.
